name: subscribeSSE
description: Opens a Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream and writes each incoming event to the specified data model path. Enables real-time data updates without agent involvement.

url.description: The SSE endpoint URL to connect to.

targetPath.description: The JSON pointer path in the data model where each incoming event will be written.

eventName.description: The specific SSE event name to listen for. If omitted, listens for the default 'message' event.
